rationale: This is an ENTRY-PACKET STUB for the A1 PR submission 5-turn greenup workflow.
Per N grand council Decision 5 verdict (2026-05-11): 8/10 OPERATOR-TRIGGER-REQUIRED.
Per CLAUDE.md 'Submission PR gate' non-negotiable: 5-turn consecutive clean-pass adversarial skunkworks council review with extreme paranoia is required BEFORE PR submission.

Per CLAUDE.md 'Operator gates must be wired and used': scripts/pre_submission_compliance_check.py --contest-final --strict must be RUN against this packet by the operator before submission; this stub records the intended invocation but does NOT execute it.

intended_invocation.note_on_paired_cpu_eval: A1's CPU eval JSON sits at submissions/a1/contest_auth_eval.cpu.json with hardware='github-actions-ubuntu-latest-x86_64'. The compliance command accepts a single auth-eval-json; the operator may rerun with --auth-eval-json submissions/a1/contest_auth_eval.cpu.json to validate the CPU axis separately.
intended_invocation.scoped_public_scan_paths_rationale: Internal custody/compliance JSONs are excluded from public-scan because they may serialize Modal-side absolute paths (e.g., /tmp/modal_auth_eval/...) and operator-local paths. The auth-eval JSON files are included in the scan ONLY through file inclusion in the submission dir; their absolute-path leak is forensic-only and is handled by the public-hygiene scope per the R2 reference packet pattern.

next_required_actions: OPERATOR_TRIGGER: initiate 5-turn skunkworks council greenup workflow per CLAUDE.md 'Submission PR gate' non-negotiable
OPERATOR_TRIGGER: execute the intended_invocation command above to populate this file with the real compliance result
OPERATOR_DECISION: per NOT YET ITEM 1 of project_top_priority_revisit_NOT_YET_operator_decisions_20260509.md: (a) freeze A1 vs lateral-leap engineering; (b) displace PR #107 apogee?
do_not_use: This stub is NOT a compliance-PASS artifact. Do not interpret 'passed: null' as 'passed: true'.
Do not submit a PR using A1 as the candidate without operator-triggered 5-turn greenup completion.
